services.name: Ospedale Civile di Cagliari
services.notes: Public hospital with emergency department (pronto soccorso), some English-speaking staff

services.name: Farmacia Comunale di Cagliari
services.notes: Well-stocked pharmacy, prescription medications, some English spoken

services.name: Conad
services.notes: Italian supermarket cooperative, fresh produce, deli counter

services.name: Intesa Sanpaolo
services.notes: Largest Italian bank, ATMs, some English-speaking staff

services.name: Ambulatorio Medico Cagliari
services.notes: General practice (medico di base), registration with ASL required

services.name: Dental Clinic Cagliari Center
services.notes: General and cosmetic dentistry, some English-speaking dentists, modern equipment

services.name: Veterinary Clinic Cagliari
services.notes: Full veterinary services, vaccinations, surgery, some English spoken

services.name: Parque Canino / Dog Park Cagliari
services.notes: Off-leash area, green space popular with dog owners, water available

services.name: Virgin Active Cagliari
services.notes: Modern gym with cardio and weight equipment, group classes, monthly memberships

services.name: All Saints Anglican Church Cagliari
services.notes: English-language services, expat community gathering point, social events

services.name: Cagliari Elmas Airport (CAG)
services.notes: International airport with domestic and international flights

services.name: Stazione Centrale Cagliari
services.notes: Trenitalia/Italo high-speed rail, local buses, regional trains

services.name: Talent Garden Cagliari
services.notes: Coworking space, high-speed internet, meeting rooms, community events

services.name: Pet Grooming Cagliari
services.notes: Professional pet grooming services, bathing, clipping, appointment recommended

services.name: InterNations Cagliari Expat Community
services.notes: International expat community center, social events, networking, relocation assistance

attractions.name: Cagliari Cultural Center
attractions.description: Cultural center with local art, history, and community events

attractions.name: Cagliari Central Park / Garden
attractions.description: Main public park with walking trails, gardens, and green space

attractions.name: Cagliari Restaurant District
attractions.description: Walkable area with diverse restaurants, cafes, and bars
